s3outposts.bucket.abortincompletemultipa: Specifies the days since the initiation of an incomplete multipart upload that Amazon S3 on Outposts waits before permanently removing all parts of the upload. For more information, see [Aborting Incomplete Multipart Uploads Using a Bucket Lifecycle Policy](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/mpuoverview.html

s3outposts.bucket.abortincompletemultipa.Description: Specifies the number of days after initiation that Amazon S3 on Outposts aborts an incomplete multipart upload.
